creator: sec@42.org
text:
If you have an environment-variable TOP (which /usr/bin/top from the base
system uses) the freetype2-port will not build.

Fix: 

unset TOP from the Makefile, or patch freetype2.
How-To-Repeat: 
ice:/usr/ports/print/freetype2#env TOP=-I make
===>  Extracting for freetype2-2.0.1
